subcodes.first_line: O scion of Abraham! [3.5s]... ...Praise be to God that whatsoever hath been announced in the Blessed Tablets unto the Israelites, and the things explicitly written in the letters of Abdu'l-Baha, are all being fulfilled
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلاله حضرت خلیل الحمد لله آنچه در الواح مبارک باسراایل تبشیر فرموده اند و در مکاتیب
subcodes.subjects: @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i, @love and unity, @unity in diversity, @spiritual transformation
